autoMode.description: Recommended allow rules for wholework /auto workflow. Copy this into .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored) and restart Claude Code before using permission-mode: auto.
allow: gh issue: wholework skills create, update, comment on, and close GitHub Issues as part of the automated workflow (e.g. gh issue create, gh issue edit, gh issue comment, gh issue close)
gh pr: wholework skills create, review, and merge pull requests as part of the automated workflow (e.g. gh pr create, gh pr review, gh pr merge, gh pr edit)
gh label: wholework scripts manage phase labels on Issues and PRs during label transitions (e.g. gh label create, gh issue edit --add-label, gh issue edit --remove-label)
gh api: wholework scripts query GitHub API for Projects V2 fields (Size, Priority, Type, Value) and GraphQL mutations needed for automated issue management
gh run: wholework scripts check CI run status while waiting for checks to complete before proceeding to the next phase (e.g. gh run list, gh run view)
git push origin main: wholework /code skill with patch route (XS/S size) commits directly to main and pushes — this is intentional for small changes that bypass PR review
